entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop that was the subject of a major breeding program in Ghana.

entities.name: GHANA
entities.description: The country where the groundnut breeding program and production are located.

entities.name: ROSETTE DISEASE
entities.description: A disease that contributed to the decline of groundnut production in Ghana.

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAM
entities.description: The systematic process of improving groundnut varieties, reinitiated in 2015.

entities.name: CSIR-SARI
entities.description: The Council for Scientific and Industrial Research - Savanna Agricultural Research Institute, involved in the breeding program.

entities.name: TROPICAL LEGUMES PROJECTS
entities.description: A project that provided support for the reinitiation of the groundnut breeding program.

entities.name: GERMPLASMS
entities.description: Local genetic resources available for use in the groundnut breeding program.

entities.name: NYANKPALA
entities.description: A location in Northern Ghana where groundnut production and processing occur.

entities.name: NORTHERN GHANA
entities.description: The region in Ghana where Nyankpala is located.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT PRODUCTION
entities.description: The activity of growing groundnuts, now viewed as a business in Nyankpala.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT PROCESSING
entities.description: The activity of processing groundnuts, now viewed as a business in Nyankpala.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT SHELLERS
entities.description: Equipment used for processing groundnuts, with increasing demand in the region.
